sections.title: Standard dialogue before Fairytale II - Cure a Queen

lines.speaker: Fairy Fixit
lines.text: What is it, human? Busy busy busy!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why are you carrying that toolbox?

lines.speaker: Fairy Fixit
lines.text: It's the fizgog! It's picking up cable again!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Uh, right. So is it safe to use the fairy rings then?

lines.speaker: Fairy Fixit
lines.text: Sure, as long as you have been given permission to use them. You should just be aware that using the fairy rings sometimes has strange results, the locations that you have been to may affect the locations you are

lines.speaker: Fairy Fixit
lines.text: trying to reach. I could fix it by replacing the fizgog and the whosprangit, I've put in a request for some new parts but they're pretty hard to get hold of, it seems.

sections.title: Standard dialogue after Fairytale II - Cure a Queen

lines.speaker: Fairy Fixit
lines.text: Pssst! Human! I've got something for you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What have you got for me?

lines.speaker: Fairy Fixit
lines.text: They said you'd helped cure our Queen. I haven't got a lot of rewards to offer, but my enchantment scrolls might help if you're working with fairy rings in your home.
